news.title: Apple reports earnings and revenue beat, boosted by services business
news.description: Apple reported 17% revenue growth, topping estimates, even as iPhone sales came up short.

news.title: Google cloud growth tops Microsoft and Amazon as all three beat estimates on AI demand
news.description: Amazon, Google and Microsoft all reported better-than-expected first-quarter cloud results, signaling an acceleration of AI demand

news.title: Trump signs DHS funding bill, ending shutdown for most of agency, including TSA
news.description: Trump on Thursday signed legislation to fund the Department of Homeland Security after the House approved the bill earlier in the afternoon.

news.title: Dow surges nearly 800 points, S&P 500 posts first close above 7,200 and best month since 2020: Live updates
news.description: The broad market index jumped more than 10% in April for its best month since November 2020.

news.title: Intel's stock more than doubles in April for best month in chipmaker's 55 years on Nasdaq
news.description: Intel's market cap more than doubled in April, boosted by a blowout earnings report and optimism that the chipmaker is in the midst of a revival.

news.title: Now is the time to rebalance your portfolio and snap up these bonds, UBS says
news.description: Government bond yields have crept higher, presenting a compelling entry point for investors, according to the bank.

news.title: Reddit reports 69% jump in revenue, topping analyst estimates
news.description: Reddit reported first-quarter earnings and revenue that exceeded Wall Street expectations.

news.title: Trump said his blockade would cause Iran's oil industry to 'explode' this week. Why that won't happen
news.description: The U.S. and Iran are locked in a standoff that will only break when one side decides it can no longer tolerate the pain. Who will move is unclear.

news.title: Trump to remove whisky tariffs after King's visit
news.description: The US president said he would lift restrictions on Scotland's ability to work with the state of Kentucky on whisky and bourbon.

news.title: Bank of England says rates could rise as Iran war fuels inflation
news.description: The Bank of England voted to hold interest rates at 3.75% as it monitors the knock-on effects of the Middle East conflict.

news.title: Faisal Islam: The wide field of uncertainties facing the UK
news.description: The Bank tries to manage expectations over what outcomes are plausible if the Middle East conflict lasts several months.

news.title: Mortgages, bills and jobs: Five takeaways from the Bank of England
news.description: The Bank's latest meeting reveals some interesting details on how our finances might be affected due to the Iran war.

news.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
news.description: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.

news.title: The kelp producer who wants to get Americans eating seaweed
news.description: Marine farmer Suzie Flores also hopes the crop can revitalise the US's small fishing towns.

news.title: Premier Inn owner to cut 3,800 jobs in savings plan
news.description: Whitbread says it will also remodel its 197 hotel restaurants as part of a five-year savings plan.

news.title: Meta in row after workers who say they saw smart glasses users having sex lose jobs
news.description: Meta and its subcontractor disagree over why over 1000 Kenya-based workers were made redundant.

news.title: Tech stocks close out best month since start of Covid pandemic in 2020
news.description: The Nasdaq Composite climbed over 15% in April, as strong earnings reports helped fuel the rally.

news.title: Reddit reports 69% jump in revenue, topping analyst estimates
news.description: Reddit reported first-quarter earnings and revenue that exceeded Wall Street expectations.

news.title: Intel's stock more than doubles in April for best month in chipmaker's 55 years on Nasdaq

news.title: Inside Wealth: Markets are underpricing the risk of Middle East pullback in AI, says tech investor Jack Selby
news.description: Middle East investors account for roughly a quarter of global AI investments over the next 5 years, said Jack Selby, managing director of Thiel Capital.

news.title: AI boom: Big Tech capital expenditures now seen topping $1 trillion in 2027
news.description: The overall cost has been causing heads to spin, but analysts say they're seeing flowthrough from investments to revenue.

news.title: Blue Owl shares surge after private credit firm cites 10X gains from SpaceX
news.description: Blue Owl said it's made 10 times its investment in SpaceX, which is headed for a record IPO later this year.

news.title: Jim Cramer is far from impressed with Microsoft earnings. Here's why
news.description: Microsoft's quarter was "not joyous," CNBC's Jim Cramer said on CNBC on Thursday.

chinaNews.title: 美国债市：美债与欧洲债市一道走高 油价下跌和日元飙升带来支撑
chinaNews.description: 美国国债守住了早盘涨势，当时欧洲和英国政府债券在欧洲央行和英国央行宣布利率决定后走强，而纽约时间下午4点会进行月底指数再平衡。

chinaNews.title: 5月1日美股成交额前20：Meta Platforms上调资本开支引发担忧
chinaNews.description: 周四美股成交额第1名英伟达收跌4.64%，股价跌破200美元，成交449.16亿美元。至此该股已经连续三个交易日下跌，市值回到5万亿美元之下。

chinaNews.title: 5月1日热门中概股普涨 贝壳涨7%，WSP控股跌3.26%
chinaNews.description: 5月1日热门中概股普涨，纳斯达克中国金龙指数（HXC）收高2.01%。 上涨个股（按市值从高到低）：台积电涨0.57%，阿里巴巴涨1.13%，拼多多涨2.26%，网易涨3.54%...

chinaNews.title: 原油：布伦特油价自四年高点回落 战争担忧抑制市场流动性
chinaNews.description: 布伦特原油在因市场预期美伊冲突可能长期化而飙升至四年高点后回落，日内交易由程序化交易主导，成交清淡。 这一全球基准的6月合约下跌，结算价每桶约114美元...
